## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it belongs in this server.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated automated tests
- [ ] Ran `./gradlew test`
- [ ] Ran release metadata/native coverage checks when packaging changed
- [ ] Updated README/docs/changelog when behavior or configuration changed

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] Classified new tools in read-only/destructive policy and relevant profiles
- [ ] Preserved account scoping, chat allow-lists, audit, and anti-spam behavior
- [ ] Kept tool schemas inside the documented portable JSON-Schema profile
- [ ] Did not add credentials, TDLib session data, private messages, or personal identifiers
